name: The Fullest Project
description: A connection hub for caregivers to find national and local special needs and disability information, resources, programs, education, and community.
mission: Be a connection hub for caregivers to find national and local special needs and disability information, resources, programs, education, and community.
goal: Take some of the burden off of caregivers and support them in providing the best care and advocacy for their special needs or disabled child.
